title: Flamingo/Spoonbill - Software update for standalone headset
scenario: DFU (software update) completes successfully on a standalone headset (not paired with charge case) via Poly Studio Mobile app Device Settings
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap the update button on the device Home screen.
3. Verify that Device Settings opens with the Software Update tab expanded and only one "Update" button visible.
4. Tap the Update button to initiate the DFU process.
5. Complete the DFU process on the standalone headset (not paired with a charge case).
expected: The DFU process for the standalone headset completes successfully.
